title: Emails and Activities List of Shared Email Accounts

posts.author: daytonabradley (Daytona B)
posts.cookedHtml: For the E&A feature, I would love to be able to search for an employee to see if their E&A sharing is on. We have many employees and sometimes when I am looking through E&A and don’t see a particular employees emails I question whether they have them turned “on” - this is especially helpful since the link between email and monday breaks when we have to update our passwords and folks forget to turn it back on.
